content:
### R1: Async Disk Cache

Replace sync std::fs in load_disk_cache/write_disk_cache with tokio::fs::read_to_string/write. Prevents blocking the tokio runtime during parallel metadata fetches.

### R2: Eager Transitive Prefetch

During BFS level N resolution, start fetching metadata for deps discovered in level N results immediately (dont wait for all level N to complete before starting level N+1 fetches). Use a shared task set instead of strict level-by-level.

### R3: spawn_blocking Build Timeout

Wrap CPU-bound bundler work in tokio::task::spawn_blocking so tokio::time::timeout can actually cancel it.
